markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content performance, review processes, and strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Priority:** Shift from foundational articles to competitor comparisons and country guides (UK, Germany, France, Italy, Poland, Iceland), which are proving more effective for driving traffic and conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**De-risking Content:** To mitigate legal liability, country guides will be edited to remove specific regulatory advice and will include a standard "informational purposes only" disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Persona Document Refinement:** The persona document is being narrowed to focus on core audiences and will be used to map specific content to personas, ensuring better targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [**Strong Performance:** Recent content is performing well, with PIX and stablecoin articles gaining traction. Overall traffic is up, and most content cohorts are ranking in the top 10.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Review

  - [**Traffic & Impressions:** Overall traffic is up. Non-branded impressions are slightly down, a trend attributed to Google's bot traffic cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Top Performers:** Recent content is driving results, with PIX and stablecoin articles gaining momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Cohort Rankings:** Most content cohorts are ranking in the top 10.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
      - [**Underperforming:** "Business Strategy" and "High Opportunity Industries" cohorts need refreshing.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Low, as expected. This is because current content is primarily "trends" articles, which users are less likely to click through from LLM summaries than from comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Strategic Shift: Content Priorities

  - [**Problem:** The content queue contains many "foundational" articles that are difficult to review and don't align with current strategic goals.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Solution:** Deprioritize these foundational articles to focus on content that drives results and aligns with Rapyd's strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**New Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
    1.  [**Competitor Comparison Articles:** High-intent content expected to drive conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
    2.  [**Country Payment Method Guides:** Proven traffic drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Next Batch of Countries:** UK, Germany, France, Italy, Poland, and Iceland.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [**Rationale for Iceland:** A key market where Rapyd is the largest payment processor.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Process Improvement: De-risking Country Guides

  - [**Problem:** Country guides contain specific regulatory/legal advice (e.g., licensing, FX controls) that creates legal liability and requires lengthy compliance reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Solution:** Edit the guides to remove this risky content and add a standard disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**Disclaimer:** "This information is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice."](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The refined guides will serve as a template for future country articles, streamlining the review process and enabling faster rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

### Persona Document Refinement

  - [**Problem:** The persona document is too broad and granular, losing focus on core audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [**Solution:** Mark is narrowing the document to better align with the core audience and their motivations.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [**Next Step:** The refined personas will be used to map specific content to each audience, ensuring better targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)

### Contract Renewal

  - [**Status:** The renewal contract has not yet been sent.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX will send the contract for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Share Mark's persona document feedback with George before their meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
      - [Send the renewal contract to Mark.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
      - [Prioritize competitor comparison and country guide articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [Add the standard legal disclaimer to all country guides.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [**Mark:**](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [Finalize edits on country guides, removing specific regulatory advice.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Use the finalized guides as a template for the next batch of countries.](https://fathom.video/share/ijQRs3hCd7A8t3fjozxDSuQz9n_xsYyj?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
